pageTitle: Eighty Days App UX Case Study: Automating Itinerary Creation with Conversational AI

sections.title: Eighty Days Travel App
sections.subtitle: Introducing AI automation to complex itinerary planning, turning multi-step manual tasks into a single chat command.

visual.altText: A mobile screen showing a chat interface where a user is requesting a travel itinerary.

sections.title: Impact by the Numbers
sections.heading: The AI feature drastically reduced the time and effort required for core application tasks, leading to higher engagement and satisfaction.

projectDescription.label: Eighty Days App
projectDescription.description: A comprehensive travel planning application where users manually build multi-destination, detailed trip itineraries.

projectDescription.label: The Core Problem
projectDescription.value: While the app provided powerful planning tools, the manual process of selecting dates, destinations, and preferences was complex and time-consuming, creating friction for first-time users.

issues.name: High Cognitive Load
issues.description: Users had to navigate multiple screens and input fields to set up a trip, leading to decision fatigue and abandonment.

issues.name: Tedious Manual Process
issues.description: Building a detailed itinerary required numerous clicks and manual integration of preferences and Google Services data.

issues.name: Steep Learning Curve
issues.description: New users struggled to understand the step-by-step logic of the itinerary creation tool.

sections.title: The Client’s Vision: Effortless Travel Planning

visual.altText: A phone screen showing a simple conversational AI interface.

goals.name: Simplify Core Feature Usage
goals.description: Make the core task of itinerary creation accessible and easy for all users, regardless of planning skill.

goals.name: Introduce Conversational UX
goals.description: Allow users to interact with the app using natural language, as if talking to a personal assistant.

goals.name: Enhance Speed and Delight
goals.description: Leverage AI and existing Google Services APIs to automate the entire process for maximum speed and user satisfaction.

sections.title: Integrating AI as a Smart Assistant
sections.subtitle: The AI Development Flow

steps.name: Natural Language Understanding (NLU)
steps.description: Developed the AI to accurately interpret natural language commands from the user (e.g., 'Plan a 5-day trip to Rome focusing on food').

steps.name: API Integration & Data Mapping
steps.description: Integrated the AI with the app's internal logic and relevant Google Services APIs to seamlessly fetch and process necessary data (maps, locations, etc.).

steps.name: Automation Scripting
steps.description: Wrote the core logic that performs all the manual steps—setting dates, adding locations, applying filters—automatically upon receiving a chat command.

steps.name: Conversational UI Design
steps.description: Designed a simple, chat-style interface that guides the user and presents the automated itinerary for easy review and final confirmation.

solutions.title: The Conversational Interface
solutions.description: Replaced confusing forms with a simple chat window. Users describe their trip goals in plain language, making the experience feel immediate and personal.

solutions.title: AI-Driven Automation
solutions.description: The AI acts as an invisible assistant, automating the entire multi-step manual process of itinerary construction, instantly generating the base plan.

solutions.title: Seamless Google Services Integration
solutions.description: The AI intelligently uses necessary Google Services API data behind the scenes to enrich the itinerary with accurate and relevant location information.

solutions.title: Enhanced User Experience (UX)
solutions.description: By removing friction and cognitive load, the feature provides a sense of delight and efficiency, encouraging users to plan more trips more often.

takeaways.title: AI Should Automate Friction
takeaways.description: The best use of AI in UX is to target and automate the most complex or multi-step manual processes, transforming tedious tasks into one-click or one-command actions.

takeaways.title: Power of Conversational UX
takeaways.description: Natural language input (chat) is the most intuitive interface. Using it to capture complex user intent and trigger automation is highly effective for improving feature adoption.

takeaways.title: UX is the Integration Layer
takeaways.description: The success of the feature was not just the AI model, but how smoothly it integrated the existing app logic and external data (Google Services API) into a seamless, user-friendly output.

limitations.name: Project Timeline
limitations.description: The project carried a firm deadline, pushing the team to stay aligned and deliver on time.

limitations.name: Phase 1
limitations.description: Initial planning and research took place, establishing the framework for the project.

limitations.name: Phase 2
limitations.description: Development and implementation, where the core features were built and tested.

limitations.name: Phase 3
limitations.description: Final review and adjustments, ensuring everything met the quality standards before the launch.
